title: PM Lane 411 Revision A - Project Miner Temp Power Apparatus Completion Revenue Recognition No-Live Design Packet
governing_firewalls: Recognition firewall: apparatus revenue recognition reads frozen-at-import quote data from seam.apparatus_financials only.
Role-based table separation: Field Tech and Field Lead roles have no SELECT on financial tables.
Vocabulary firewall: the legacy actual revenue term is not a valid concept in this design.

constraints: trigger enforces recognition_rate_per_hour_snapshot equals referenced project snapshot rate

rls_grants.seam.apparatus_financials: SELECT granted to PM role and Finance role only; INSERT granted to PM role only; no grants to Field Tech, Field Lead, anon, or authenticated.
rls_grants.seam.project_contract_snapshots: SELECT granted to PM role and Finance role only; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.scope_labor_details: SELECT granted to PM role and Finance role only; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.apparatus_revenue_events: SELECT granted to PM role and Finance role only; INSERT granted to PM role only; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.apparatus: Field Tech and Field Lead read grants remain because the table no longer contains financial data.

scope_financials_view.scope_quoted_source: seam.apparatus_financials joined to seam.apparatus by apparatus_id

lane_280_extension.precondition: apparatus has an associated seam.apparatus_financials row for the referenced contract_snapshot_id

reserved_future_lane.rule: Operational tables have no data path into recognition behavior.

validation_steps: Search confirms seam.apparatus carries no quoted_hours, quoted_revenue, or contract_snapshot_id in this revision packet
Search confirms apparatus_financials includes unique (apparatus_id, contract_snapshot_id) and the internal-consistency CHECK
Search confirms Field Tech and Field Lead have no grants on financial tables
Search confirms scope_quoted CTE reads from seam.apparatus_financials
Search confirms Lane 280 extension references seam.apparatus_financials.quoted_revenue
Search confirms the legacy underscore revenue token is absent from Lane 411 Revision A and Lane 412 Revision A
